features.featureTitle: Update the app title/branding displayed in the header (Layout.tsx logo/title text) and the HTML page title (frontend/index.html <title> tag) from the current name ('GameVault' / 'GameAccount Marketplace') to 'GAME BAZAR'. The selected element is the <h1> in the main browse page hero banner — update that text to 'GAME BAZAR' as well. Ensure all visible instances of the old app name across the UI are replaced with 'GAME BAZAR'.
